question: Will I weigh less than 90kg on the morning 21st of June 2026
reason: Achieving a 5.7 kg weight loss in 25 days is challenging but possible with strict adherence to diet and exercise.
evidence: CDC recommends 1–2 pounds (0.45–0.9 kg) weight loss per week as safe and sustainable.
Consistent calorie tracking can lead to significant weight loss over time.
Rapid weight loss may be unsustainable and could lead to muscle loss.
